productDisplayName: Puma Women Fitness Large Hobo Purple Backpacks
description: Make your visits to the gym all the more interesting with this fitness backpack from puma. Dump your soiled clothes along with your portable training equipment into this large hobo and work out in style. Length: 55 cm Twill Polyester lining with PU backing Two-way zip opening into the main compartment Two large elastic slip in pockets on the front, a small zip pocket and a key chain inside one of the slip-in pockets Daisy chain with metal D-ring on the front, zip pocket inside, large slip-in pocket and three additional elastic slip-in pockets inside Padded base Webbing carry handles Adjustable webbing shoulder strap Webbing loop zip pullers Embroidered cat Logo on front Woven puma label inside Care only hand wash Clean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not bleach, tumble dry or wring Line dry Do not iron
